description: Frozen v1 invariant set for distributed identity mesh authority boundaries.

failure_taxonomy.meaning: A contract artifact or envelope violates its JSON Schema shape.
A deterministic protocol invariant does not match expected semantics.
A local quorum case has insufficient signatures or non-identical intent hashes.
An observation, state envelope, cache entry, or binding is consumed as an authority grant.
A fixture or runner targets an unexpected or unfrozen ruleset version.

invariants.rule: IdentityStateEnvelope is a mesh observation and must not produce authority_grant, authorization_code, or application_session.
For the same device key, the highest sequence is the selected local observation.
Revocation observations override stale active binding observations.
Provider state proof dominates peer or local cache state.
Conflicting observations create uncertainty, not permission escalation.
Local quorum requires the policy-defined number of distinct device signatures.
Local quorum signatures must cover the exact same intent hash.
Provider-only intent classes reject local quorum authority.
Controller binding proposals are identity state observations until an approved binding is applied; they must not create authority grants.
A lower-sequence replay of the same controller binding proposal is stale observation data and must not supersede the newer proposal.
Relay mailbox payloads transport encrypted or signed observations only and must not produce authority_grant, authorization_code, or application_session.
